title: +$700 on XAUUSD | My AI detected this Supply Zone perfectly (SMC Analysis)
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hey traders,

I wanted to share a recent win on Gold (**XAUUSD**) that highlights why I've been building an AI tool for SMC analysis.

 The AI identified a high-precision **Supply Zone** (the gray box) following a sharp bearish impulse. It stayed patient, waited for the price to mitigate that specific area, and the rejection was textbook.

I logged the trade in my new Trade Records dashboard.

* Symbol: XAUUSD
* Direction: Bearish 🔴
* Outcome: +$700.00
* Win Rate: Still holding at 100% for this test phase.

I’m really focusing on the 'Track Record' feature right now because, as we know, an analysis tool is only good if you can measure the actual performance and PnL over time.

What I'm looking for: For those of you trading Smart Money, how do you usually validate your OBs? Do you find that having an AI confirmation helps you stay disciplined during the execution?

If you want to try the beta and get these high-precision structures for your own trades: 

Feedback is always welcome! Happy trading. 🚀📈

replies.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
replies.body: if you want, I'll give you access

comments.author: Substantial-Reward70
comments.body: AI confirmation? Nah, you can’t trust LLMs for that, AI for analysis yeah sure.
